zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes Daundy於1495年出生在英國素福爾可易普斯維其時，她的父親Edmund Daundye30歲，母親Lady Anne Bacon31歲。她於1517年與Sir William Henry Ferneley在英國素福爾可可廷 聖 彼得結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1572年6月在英國素福爾可可廷 聖 彼得享年77歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可可廷 聖 彼得。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Agnes Daundy于1495年出生在英国素福爾可易普斯維其时，她的父亲Edmund Daundye30岁，母亲Lady Anne Bacon31岁。她于1517年与Sir William Henry Ferneley在英国素福爾可可廷 聖 彼得结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1572年6月在英国素福爾可可廷 聖 彼得享年77岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可可廷 聖 彼得。

nameMeanings.name: Daundy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: from a diminutive of the Middle English and Older Scots personal name Dand, a rhyming pet form of both Randolph and Andrew (the latter especially in Scotland).

variants.name: Randolph
meanings: English and German: from Randolf, an ancient Germanic personal name composed of the elements rand ‘rim (of a shield), shield’ + wolf ‘wolf’. This was introduced into England by the Normans in Old French forms of two different ancient Germanic personal names which became confused with each other: Randulf (from rand ‘(shield-)edge’ + wulf ‘wolf’) and Rannulf (from hraf(a)n ‘raven’ + wulf ‘wolf’).

History: An American family bearing this surname are descended from William Randolph (c. 1651–1711), a planter and merchant, a member of a family that originally came from Sussex, England. William Randolph emigrated from Warwickshire to VA c. 1673. He was a forebear of Thomas Jefferson and Robert E. Lee. Randolph had seven sons, each of whom inherited an estate, the name of which was sometimes added to their own, such as Sir John Randolph of Tazewell. His great-grandsons included Edmund Randolph (1753–1813), first attorney general of the US and one of the framers of the US Constitution, and the diplomat and statesman John Randolph of Roanoke (1773–1833), who served as US minister to Russia.

variants.name: Dendy
meanings: English (Sussex and Surrey): perhaps a variant of Dandy , though the sound change is not regular. Alternatively, the name may be a variant of Denny with an intrusive -d-.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes Daundy was born in 1495, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, her father, Edmund Daundye, was 30 and her mother, Lady Anne Bacon, was 31. She married Sir William Henry Ferneley in 1517, in Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in June 1572, in Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agnes Daundy est née en 1495, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Daundye, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Bacon, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Henry Ferneley en 1517, à Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en juin 1572, à Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Agnes Daundy 1495 in Ipswich, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Daundye 30 und ihre Mutter Lady Anne Bacon 31. Sie hat 1517 in Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England Sir William Henry Ferneley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb im Juni 1572 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England und wurde in Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Daundy è nata il nel 1495 nel Ipswich, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Edmund Daundye, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lady Anne Bacon, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Henry Ferneley nel 1517, nel Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel giugno 1572, nel Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Daundyが1495年にイギリススフォルクイプスウィチで生まれた時，父Edmund Daundyeは30歳，母Lady Anne Baconは31歳であった。1517年にイギリススフォルククレエティング スト ペターでSir William Henry Ferneleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1572年6月にイギリススフォルククレエティング スト ペターで77歳で死去し，イギリススフォルククレエティング スト ペターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Daundy(이)가 1495년 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Daundye(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne Bacon(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1517년 영국 수폴크 크릿잉 스트 피터에서 Sir William Henry Ferneley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1572년 6월 영국 수폴크 크릿잉 스트 피터에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 크릿잉 스트 피터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Daundy nasceu em 1495, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Daundye, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Bacon, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Henry Ferneley em 1517, em Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em junho de 1572, em Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes Daundy родилась в 1495 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund Daundye было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Bacon, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Henry Ferneley в 1517 г. в местности критинг ст питир, суффолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла июнь 1572 г. в местности критинг ст питир, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности критинг ст питир, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Agnes Daundy nació en 1495, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Daundye, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Anne Bacon, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir William Henry Ferneley en 1517, en Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en junio de 1572, en Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
